title: santolina macrophylla
intro: Santolina macrophylla, also known as large grey lavender or big grey lavender, is a shrubby perennial plant belonging to the sunflower family (Asteraceae). The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of digestive issues, skin problems, and as an antiseptic agent. The health benefits of Santolina macrophylla include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help soothe digestive issues and promote wound healing. The plant can be prepared as an herbal infusion or tincture, and its leaves and flowers are often used in traditional medicine to make teas, salves, and ointments.
